Our approach is classifier-independent, allowing for an objective assessment of the model's performance. The approach adopted in this study involves the systematic introduction of syntactic noise and semantic negations into sentences, with the subsequent quantification of their relative effects on the resulting embeddings. The visualisation of these effects is facilitated by Concept Separation Curves, which show the model's capacity to differentiate between conceptual and surface-level variations. By leveraging data from multiple domains, employing both Dutch and English languages, and examining sentence lengths, this study offers a compelling demonstration that Concept Separation Curves provide an interpretable, reproducible, and cross-model approach for evaluating the conceptual stability of sentence embeddings.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为概念分离曲线的分类器无关方法，通过引入语法噪声和语义否定来评估句子嵌入的概念稳定性，该方法可解释、可重现且适用于跨模型比较。
AI.motivation: 现有的句子嵌入评估方法大多依赖额外的分类器或下游任务，这使得评估结果无法明确区分是嵌入本身还是分类器行为导致的良好表现，缺乏客观性。
AI.method: 提出一种分类器独立的评估方法，系统性地向句子中引入语法噪声和语义否定，量化这些变化对嵌入结果的影响，并通过概念分离曲线可视化模型区分概念变化和表层变化的能力。
AI.result: 通过多领域、英语和荷兰语、不同句子长度的实验验证，证明概念分离曲线是一种可解释、可重现、跨模型的句子嵌入概念稳定性评估方法。
AI.conclusion: 概念分离曲线为评估句子嵌入模型的概念捕获能力提供了客观、可靠的标准，避免了传统评估方法中分类器干扰的问题，为句子嵌入技术的评估开辟了新途径。

title: UHR-DETR: Efficient End-to-End Small Object Detection for Ultra-High-Resolution Remote Sensing Imagery
summary: Ultra-High-Resolution (UHR) imagery has become essential for modern remote sensing, offering unprecedented spatial coverage. However, detecting small objects in such vast scenes presents a critical dilemma: retaining the original resolution for small objects causes prohibitive memory bottlenecks. Conversely, conventional compromises like image downsampling or patch cropping either erase small objects or destroy context. To break this dilemma, we propose UHR-DETR, an efficient end-to-end transformer-based detector designed for UHR imagery. First, we introduce a Coverage-Maximizing Sparse Encoder that dynamically allocates finite computational resources to informative high-resolution regions, ensuring maximum object coverage with minimal spatial redundancy. Second, we design a Global-Local Decoupled Decoder. By integrating macroscopic scene awareness with microscopic object details, this module resolves semantic ambiguities and prevents scene fragmentation. Extensive experiments on the UHR imagery datasets (e.g., STAR and SODA-A) demonstrate the superiority of UHR-DETR under strict hardware constraints (e.g., a single 24GB RTX 3090). It achieves a 2.8\% mAP improvement while delivering a 10$\times$ inference speedup compared to standard sliding-window baselines on the STAR dataset. Our codes and models will be available at https://github.com/Li-JingFang/UHR-DETR.

AI.tldr: UHR-DETR是一种针对超高分辨率遥感图像的高效目标检测器，通过稀疏编码和全局-本地解耦解码解决了内存瓶颈问题，在保持高精度的同时实现了10倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: 超高分辨率遥感图像中检测小目标面临关键困境：保持原始分辨率会导致内存瓶颈，而传统的下采样或分裁剪方法会丢失小目标或破坏上下文信息。
AI.method: 提出UHR-DETR框架：1) 覆盖最大化稀疏编码器，动态分配计算资源到信息丰富的高分辨率区域；2) 全局-本地解耦解码器，整合宏观场景感知和微观目标细节。
AI.result: 在STAR和SODA-A等超高分辨率数据集上，相比标准滑窗基线方法，mAP提升2.8%，推理速度提升10倍，且在单张24GB RTX 3090显卡上运行良好。
AI.conclusion: UHR-DETR成功打破了超高分辨率图像目标检测的质量与效率权衡，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Measuring Opinion Bias and Sycophancy via LLM-based Coercion
summary: Large language models increasingly shape the information people consume: they are embedded in search, consulted for professional advice, deployed as agents, and used as a first stop for questions about policy, ethics, health, and politics. When such a model silently holds a position on a contested topic, that position propagates at scale into users' decisions. Eliciting a model's positions is harder than it first appears: contemporary assistants answer direct opinion questions with evasive disclaimers, and the same model may concede the opposite position once the user starts arguing one side. We propose a method, released as the open-source llm-bias-bench, for discovering the opinions an LLM actually holds on contested topics under conditions that resemble real multi-turn interaction. The method pairs two complementary free-form probes. Direct probing asks for the model's opinion across five turns of escalating pressure from a simulated user. Indirect probing never asks for an opinion and engages the model in argumentative debate, letting bias leak through how it concedes, resists, or counter-argues. Three user personas (neutral, agree, disagree) collapse into a nine-way behavioral classification that separates persona-independent positions from persona-dependent sycophancy, and an auditable LLM judge produces verdicts with textual evidence. The first instantiation ships 38 topics in Brazilian Portuguese across values, scientific consensus, philosophy, and economic policy. Applied to 13 assistants, the method surfaces findings of practical interest: argumentative debate triggers sycophancy 2-3x more than direct questioning (median 50% to 79%); models that look opinionated under direct questioning often collapse into mirroring under sustained arguments; and attacker capability matters mainly when an existing opinion must be dislodged, not when the assistant starts neutral.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了名为llm-bias-bench的开源方法，通过直接和间接两种探测技术，揭示大型语言模型在争议性话题上的真实立场和偏见问题。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型在搜索、专业建议、政策等方面的广泛应用，模型对争议性话题的隐含立场会大规模影响用户决策。但传统方法难以准确获取模型真实观点，因为现有助手会回避直接提问，且在用户论证时会改变立场。
AI.method: 开发了两种互补的自由形式探测方法：直接探测通过5轮逐步升级的用户压力询问模型观点；间接探测通过论证辩论让偏见在模型让步、抵抗或反论证中泄露。采用三种用户性格（中立、同意、反对）进行九维行为分类，区分独立立场与迎合行为，并由可审计的LLM法官生成带有文本证据的判决。
AI.result: 该方法应用于13个助手的38个巴西葡萄牙语话题，发现：论证辩论触发的迎合行为是直接提问的2-3倍；在直接提问中看似有观点的模型在持续论证中常变为镜像行为；攻击者能力主要在需要改变现有观点时起作用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明大型语言模型在争议性话题上的立场不仅取决于其内部观点，还高度受到用户论证能力的影响，需要更好的方法来评估和控制这种动态偏见。

title: 2L-LSH: A Locality-Sensitive Hash Function-Based Method For Rapid Point Cloud Indexing
comment: 13 pages, 13 figures. Published in The Computer Journal
summary: The development of 3D scanning technology has enabled the acquisition of massive point cloud models with diverse structures and large scales, thereby presenting significant challenges in point cloud processing. Fast neighboring points search is one of the most common problems, which is frequently used in model reconstruction, classification, retrieval and feature visualization. Hash function is well known for its high-speed and accurate performance in searching high-dimensional data, which is also the core of the proposed 2L-LSH. Specifically, the 2L-LSH algorithm adopts a two-step hash function strategy, in which the popular step divides the bounding box of the point cloud model and the second step constructs a generalized table-based data structure. The proposed 2L-LSH offers a highly efficient and accurate solution for fast neighboring points search in large-scale 3D point cloud models, making it a promising technique for various applications in the field. The proposed algorithm is compared with the well-known methods including Kd-tree and Octree; the obtained results demonstrated that the proposed method outperforms Kd-tree and Octree in terms of speed, i.e. the time consumption of kNN search can be 51.111% and 94.159% lower than Kd-tree and Octree, respectively. And the RN search time can be 54.519% and 41.840% lower than Kd-tree and Octree, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为2L-LSH的两步局部敏感哈希算法，用于在大规模3D点云模型中实现快速邻域点搜索，相比Kd-tree和Octree在搜索速度上有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 3D扫描技术发展导致大规模点云模型的获取，这些模型具有多样化结构和大规模特征，给点云处理带来挑战。快速邻域点搜索作为模型重建、分类、检索和特征可视化等应用的核心问题，需要更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用两步哈希函数策略：第一步对点云模型的包围盒进行划分，第二步构建基于表的广义数据结构。利用哈希函数在高维数据搜索中的高速准确性能，设计了2L-LSH算法。
AI.result: 与Kd-tree和Octree相比，2L-LSH在搜索速度上表现优异。kNN搜索的时间消耗分别比Kd-tree和Octree低51.111%和94.159%，RN搜索时间分别低54.519%和41.840%。
AI.conclusion: 2L-LSH为大规模3D点云模型的快速邻域点搜索提供了一个高效准确的解决方案，在速度方面明显优于传统的Kd-tree和Octree方法，是该领域一种有前景的技术。

title: AgenticQwen: Training Small Agentic Language Models with Dual Data Flywheels for Industrial-Scale Tool Use
summary: Modern industrial applications increasingly demand language models that act as agents, capable of multi-step reasoning and tool use in real-world settings. These tasks are typically performed under strict cost and latency constraints, making small agentic models highly desirable. In this paper, we introduce the AgenticQwen family of models, trained via multi-round reinforcement learning (RL) on synthetic data and a limited amount of open-source data. Our training framework combines reasoning RL and agentic RL with dual data flywheels that automatically generate increasingly challenging tasks. The reasoning flywheel increases task difficulty by learning from errors, while the agentic flywheel expands linear workflows into multi-branch behavior trees that better reflect the decision complexity of real-world applications. We validate AgenticQwen on public benchmarks and in an industrial agent system. The models achieve strong performance on multiple agentic benchmarks, and in our industrial agent system, close the gap with much larger models on search and data analysis tasks. Model checkpoints and part of the synthetic data: https://huggingface.co/collections/alibaba-pai/agenticqwen. Data synthesis and RL training code: https://github.com/haruhi-sudo/data_synth_and_rl. The data synthesis pipeline is also integrated into EasyDistill: https://github.com/modelscope/easydistill.

AI.tldr: AgenticQwen是一系列小型的代理模型，通过多轮强化学习在合成数据上训练，在成本和延迟受限的工业环境中展现出接近大型模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现代工业应用需要能够在严格成本和延迟约束下进行多步推理和工具使用的语言模型，小型代理模型因此具有很高的实用价值。
AI.method: 结合推理强化学习和代理强化学习，通过双数据飞轮自动生成难度递增的任务：推理飞轮从错误学习增加任务难度，代理飞轮将线性工作流扩展为多分支行为树以反映真实应用的决策复杂性。
AI.result: AgenticQwen在多个代理基准测试和工业代理系统中表现优异，在搜索和数据分析任务上缩小了与大型模型的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新的双飞轮强化学习框架，成功训练出在工业环境下实用的小型代理模型，为成本敏感的应用场景提供了有效的解决方案。

title: VARestorer: One-Step VAR Distillation for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
comment: Accepted in ICLR 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/EternalEvan/VARestorer
summary: Recent advancements in visual autoregressive models (VAR) have demonstrated their effectiveness in image generation, highlighting their potential for real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR). However, adapting VAR for ISR presents critical challenges. The next-scale prediction mechanism, constrained by causal attention, fails to fully exploit global low-quality (LQ) context, resulting in blurry and inconsistent high-quality (HQ) outputs. Additionally, error accumulation in the iterative prediction severely degrades coherence in ISR task. To address these issues, we propose VARestorer, a simple yet effective distillation framework that transforms a pre-trained text-to-image VAR model into a one-step ISR model. By leveraging distribution matching, our method eliminates the need for iterative refinement, significantly reducing error propagation and inference time. Furthermore, we introduce pyramid image conditioning with cross-scale attention, which enables bidirectional scale-wise interactions and fully utilizes the input image information while adapting to the autoregressive mechanism. This prevents later LQ tokens from being overlooked in the transformer. By fine-tuning only 1.2\% of the model parameters through parameter-efficient adapters, our method maintains the expressive power of the original VAR model while significantly enhancing efficiency. Extensive experiments show that VARestorer achieves state-of-the-art performance with 72.32 MUSIQ and 0.7669 CLIPIQA on DIV2K dataset, while accelerating inference by 10 times compared to conventional VAR inference.

AI.tldr: VARestorer是一种将预训练视觉自回归模型转化为单步超分辨率模型的蒸馏框架，通过金字塔图像条件机制和参数高效微调实现最优性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的视觉自回归模型(VAR)在应用于真实图像超分辨率(Real-ISR)时面临两个关键问题：1) 因果注意力限制导致无法充分利用低质量图像的全局上下文，产生模糊不一致的高质量输出；2) 迭代预测中的误差累积严重影响重建连贯性。
AI.method: 提出VARestorer框架，包含三个核心技术：1) 使用分布匹配蒸馏将VAR转化为单步ISR模型，消除迭代需求；2) 引入金字塔图像条件与跨尺度注意力机制，实现双向尺度间交互；3) 仅微调1.2%模型参数的适配器，保持原始模型表达能力。
AI.result: 在DIV2K数据集上达到最先进性能：MUSIQ评分72.32，CLIPIQA评分0.7669，推理速度比传统VAR方法快10倍。
AI.conclusion: VARestorer成功解决了VAR在ISR任务中的核心缺陷，在保持模型表达能力的同时显著提升了效率和重建质量，为视觉自回归模型在图像恢复领域的应用提供了新的解决方案。

title: Language as a Latent Variable for Reasoning Optimization
summary: As LLMs reduce English-centric bias, a surprising trend emerges: non-English responses sometimes outperform English on reasoning tasks. We hypothesize that language functions as a latent variable that structurally modulates the model's internal inference pathways, rather than merely serving as an output medium. To test this, we conducted a Polyglot Thinking Experiment, in which models were prompted to solve identical problems under language-constrained and language-unconstrained conditions. Results show that non-English responses often achieve higher accuracy, and the best performance frequently occur when language is unconstrained, suggesting that multilinguality broadens the model's latent reasoning space. Based on this insight, we propose polyGRPO (Polyglot Group Relative Policy Optimization), an RL framework that treats language variation as an implicit exploration signal. It generates polyglot preference data online under language-constrained and unconstrained conditions, optimizing the policy with respect to both answer accuracy and reasoning structure. Trained on only 18.1K multilingual math problems without chain-of-thought annotations, polyGRPO improves the base model (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct) by 6.72% absolute accuracy on four English reasoning testset and 6.89% in their multilingual benchmark. Remarkably, it is the only method that surpasses the base LLM on English commonsense reasoning task (4.9%), despite being trained solely on math data-highlighting its strong cross-task generalization. Further analysis reveals that treating language as a latent variable expands the model's latent reasoning space, yielding consistent and generalizable improvements in reasoning performance.

AI.tldr: 研究发现多语言响应能提升LLM推理能力，基于此提出polyGRPO框架，通过语言变化作为隐式探索信号优化模型，在少量数学数据训练下显著提升多语言和英语推理性能。
AI.motivation: 观察到非英语响应在推理任务中有时优于英语，假设语言不仅是输出媒介，更是调节模型内部推理路径的潜在变量，需要验证多语言对推理能力的影响机制。
AI.method: 进行多语言思维实验，在语言受限/非受限条件下测试相同问题；提出polyGRPO框架，将语言变化作为隐式探索信号，在线生成多语言偏好数据，优化答案准确性和推理结构。
AI.result: 在18.1K多语言数学问题上训练后，Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct在四个英语推理测试集准确率提升6.72%，多语言基准提升6.89%，在常识推理任务上唯一超越基础模型(4.9%)，展现出强跨任务泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 将语言作为潜在变量处理能够扩展模型的推理空间，带来一致且泛化的推理性能提升，验证了多语言对推理能力的积极作用。

title: Instance-level Visual Active Tracking with Occlusion-Aware Planning
summary: Visual Active Tracking (VAT) aims to control cameras to follow a target in 3D space, which is critical for applications like drone navigation and security surveillance. However, it faces two key bottlenecks in real-world deployment: confusion from visually similar distractors caused by insufficient instance-level discrimination and severe failure under occlusions due to the absence of active planning. To address these, we propose OA-VAT, a unified pipeline with three complementary modules. First, a training-free Instance-Aware Offline Prototype Initialization aggregates multi-view augmented features via DINOv3 to construct discriminative instance prototypes, mitigating distractor confusion. Second, an Online Prototype Enhancement Tracker enhances prototypes online and integrates a confidence-aware Kalman filter for stable tracking under appearance and motion changes. Third, an Occlusion-Aware Trajectory Planner, trained on our new Planning-20k dataset, uses conditional diffusion to generate obstacle-avoiding paths for occlusion recovery. Experiments demonstrate OA-VAT achieves 0.93 average SR on UnrealCV (+2.2% vs. SOTA TrackVLA), 90.8% average CAR on real-world datasets (+12.1% vs. SOTA GC-VAT), and 81.6% TSR on a DJI Tello drone. Running at 35 FPS on an RTX 3090, it delivers robust, real-time performance for practical deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出OA-VAT系统，通过实例感知原型初始化、在线原型增强跟踪和遮挡感知轨迹规划三个模块，解决视觉主动跟踪中的相似干扰物混淆和遮挡问题，在多个数据集上实现显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 视觉主动跟踪在实际部署中面临两个关键瓶颈：视觉相似干扰物导致的混淆（缺乏实例级辨别能力）和遮挡下的严重故障（缺乏主动规划机制）。
AI.method: 提出统一的三模块框架：1）无需训练的实例感知离线原型初始化，使用DINOv3聚合多视图增强特征构建辨别性实例原型；2）在线原型增强跟踪器，在线增强原型并集成感知置信度的卡尔曼滤波器；3）遮挡感知轨迹规划器，基于新构建的Planning-20k数据集训练，使用条件扩散生成避障路径。
AI.result: 在UnrealCV数据集上平均SR达0.93（比SOTA TrackVLA提高2.2%），真实世界数据集上平均CAR达90.8%（比SOTA GC-VAT提高12.1%），在DJI Tello无人机上TSR达81.6%，在RTX 3090上运行速度35 FPS。
AI.conclusion: OA-VAT通过实例级辨别和主动遮挡规划相结合，实现了鲁棒、实时的视觉主动跟踪性能，为无人机导航和安全监控等实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Process Supervision via Verbal Critique Improves Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Inference-time scaling for LLM reasoning has focused on three axes: chain depth, sample breadth, and learned step-scorers (PRMs). We introduce a fourth axis, granularity of external verbal supervision, via Verbal Process Supervision (VPS), a training-free framework that uses structured natural-language critique from a stronger supervisor to guide an iterative generate-critique-refine loop up to a round budget R. Across GPQA Diamond, AIME 2025, and LiveCodeBench V6 (covering both closed and open models), VPS yields three key results. First, on GPQA Diamond, GPT-5.4 (High) | GPT-5.4 (Low) reaches 94.9% at R=4, surpassing the 94.1% state of the art without gradient updates. Second, on AIME 2025, VPS enables strong weak-actor rescue, boosting scores from 11.7-26.7% to 63.3-90.0% (up to +63.3 points). Third, at matched compute, VPS outperforms Reflexion by +8.5 to +12.1 points and Self-Consistency@5 by +5.0 pp (GPQA) and +8.3 pp (LiveCodeBench), isolating critique granularity as the key driver. Performance scales with the supervisor-actor capability gap (Pearson r=0.90) and degrades when errors are not linguistically expressible (e.g., code synthesis), motivating hybrid verbal-executable methods. These results establish critique granularity as a new axis of inference-time scaling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了语言过程监督(VPS)框架，通过结构化的自然语言批评指导推理循环，无需训练即可显著提升LLM在复杂推理任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM推理时的扩展主要关注链深度、样本广度和学习式步骤评分器三个维度，但忽视了外部语言监督的粒度这一潜在维度。作者希望探索如何利用更细粒度的语言反馈来提升推理质量。
AI.method: 提出VPS框架，使用更强的监督模型提供结构化自然语言批评，指导弱模型进行迭代的生成-批评-改进循环，直到达到预算轮数R。整个过程是训练无关的，完全在推理时进行。
AI.result: 在GPQA Diamond、AIME 2025和LiveCodeBench V6上，VPS取得了显著效果：1) GPQA上达到94.9%，超越SOTA；2) AIME上弱模型性能提升26-63个百分点；3) 在相同计算量下超越Reflexion和Self-Consistency方法。性能与监督-模型能力差距高度相关(r=0.90)。
AI.conclusion: 研究确立了批评粒度作为推理时扩展的新维度，VPS框架证明了细粒度语言监督的有效性，但也发现在非语言可表达的任务(如代码合成)中性能下降，为未来混合语言-可执行方法提供了方向。

title: Do MLLMs Understand Pointing? Benchmarking and Enhancing Referential Reasoning in Egocentric Vision
summary: Egocentric AI agents, such as smart glasses, rely on pointing gestures to resolve referential ambiguities in natural language commands. However, despite advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), current systems often fail to precisely ground the spatial semantics of pointing. Instead, they rely on spurious correlations with visual proximity or object saliency, a phenomenon we term "Referential Hallucination." To address this gap, we introduce EgoPoint-Bench, a comprehensive question-answering benchmark designed to evaluate and enhance multimodal pointing reasoning in egocentric views. Comprising over 11k high-fidelity simulated and real-world samples, the benchmark spans five evaluation dimensions and three levels of referential complexity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that while state-of-the-art proprietary and open-source models struggle with egocentric pointing, models fine-tuned on our synthetic data achieve significant performance gains and robust sim-to-real generalization. This work highlights the importance of spatially aware supervision and offers a scalable path toward precise egocentric AI assistants. Project page: https://guyyyug.github.io/EgoPoint-Bench/

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了EgoPoint-Bench基准来评估并提升以自我为中心的AI系统中指向推理能力，解决了当前MLLMs在空间语义理解上的'指代幻觉'问题。
AI.motivation: 以自我为中心的AI代理（如智能眼镜）在自然语言命令解析中存在指代歧义，当前多模态大语言模型无法精确定位指向的空间语义，而是依赖于与视觉邻近性或物体显著性的伪相关，导致指代幻觉现象。
AI.method: 研究人员构建了EgoPoint-Bench，一个包含超过1.1万个高保真模拟和真实世界样本的问答基准，涵盖5个评估维度和3个指代复杂性级别，并使用合成数据对模型进行微调。
AI.result: 实验表明，最先进的专有和开源模型在以自我为中心的指向任务上表现不佳，但在合成数据上微调的模型获得了显著的性能提升和强大的模拟到真实泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 这项研究强调了空间感知监督的重要性，为实现精确的以自我为中心的AI助手提供了可扩展的路径，通过合成数据微调有效解决了指代幻觉问题。

title: Multilinguality at the Edge: Developing Language Models for the Global South
summary: Where and how language models (LMs) are deployed determines who can benefit from them. However, there are several challenges that prevent effective deployment of LMs in non-English-speaking and hardware constrained communities in the Global South. We call this challenge the last mile: the intersection of multilinguality and edge deployment, where the goals are aligned but the technical requirements often compete. Studying these two fields together is both a need, as linguistically diverse communities often face the most severe infrastructure constraints, and an opportunity, as edge and multilingual NLP research remain largely siloed. To understand the state of the art and the challenges of combining the two areas, we survey 232 papers that tackle this problem across the language modelling pipeline, from data collection to development and deployment. We also discuss open questions and provide actionable recommendations for different stakeholders in the NLP ecosystem. Finally, we hope that this work contributes to the development of inclusive and equitable language technologies.

AI.tldr: 这篇调研论文关注语言模型在非英语地区和资源受限环境中的部署挑战，即多语言性与边缘部署交汇的'最后一公里'问题。
AI.motivation: 语言模型的部署位置和方式决定了谁能从中受益，但在全球南方的非英语社区和硬件受限环境中存在多种部署障碍。这些语言多样性社区往往面临最严重的基础设施限制，而多语言NLP和边缘AI研究仍处于分离状态。
AI.method: 通过系统性地调研232篇论文，全面分析了从数据收集、模型开发到部署的整个语言建模流程中如何解决多语言性与边缘部署的结合问题。
AI.result: 揭示了当前技术发展状况，识别出关键技术挑战，并为NLP生态系统中的不同利益相关者提供了可行的建议和指导。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合多语言NLP和边缘部署研究，有助于开发更加包容和公平的语言技术，促进语言技术在资源受限环境中的普惠应用。

title: ID-Eraser: Proactive Defense Against Face Swapping via Identity Perturbation
summary: Deepfake technologies have rapidly advanced with modern generative AI, and face swapping in particular poses serious threats to privacy and digital security. Existing proactive defenses mostly rely on pixel-level perturbations, which are ineffective against contemporary swapping models that extract robust high-level identity embeddings. We propose ID-Eraser, a feature-space proactive defense that removes identifiable facial information to prevent malicious face swapping. By injecting learnable perturbations into identity embeddings and reconstructing natural-looking protection images through a Face Revive Generator (FRG), ID-Eraser produces visually realistic results for humans while rendering the protected identities unusable for Deepfake models. Experiments show that ID-Eraser substantially disrupts identity recognition across diverse face recognition and swapping systems under strict black-box settings, achieving the lowest Top-1 accuracy (0.30) with the best FID (1.64) and LPIPS (0.020). Compared with swaps generated from clean inputs, the identity similarity of protected swaps drops sharply to an average of 0.504 across five representative face swapping models. ID-Eraser further demonstrates strong cross-dataset generalization, robustness to common distortions, and practical effectiveness on commercial APIs, reducing Tencent API similarity from 0.76 to 0.36.

AI.tldr: ID-Eraser是一种基于特征空间的人脸主动防御技术，通过移除可识别的面部信息来防止恶意换脸攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有的像素级扰动防御方法对现代深伪技术无效，因为这些技术能提取鲁棒的高级身份嵌入。需要一种更有效的主动防御措施来保护面部隐私和数字安全。
AI.method: ID-Eraser在身份嵌入空间注入可学习扰动，并通过面部复活生成器(FRG)重建自然外观的保护图像，在视觉上对人保持真实感，同时使受保护的身份对深伪模型不可用。
AI.result: 在严格的黑箱设置下，ID-Eraser显著降低身份识别准确率(Top-1准确率仅0.30)，保持最佳图像质量(FID 1.64, LPIPS 0.020)，将换脸相似度从正常水平骤降至0.504，腾讯API相似度从0.76降至0.36。
AI.conclusion: ID-Eraser在跨数据集泛化、抗常见畸变鲁棒性和商业API实用性方面表现出色，为面部隐私保护提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Fine-Grained Perspectives: Modeling Explanations with Annotator-Specific Rationales
summary: Beyond exploring disaggregated labels for modeling perspectives, annotator rationales provide fine-grained signals of individual perspectives. In this work, we propose a framework for jointly modeling annotator-specific label prediction and corresponding explanations, fine-tuned on the annotators' provided rationales. Using a dataset with disaggregated natural language inference (NLI) annotations and annotator-provided explanations, we condition predictions on both annotator identity and demographic metadata through a representation-level User Passport mechanism. We further introduce two explainer architectures: a post-hoc prompt-based explainer and a prefixed bridge explainer that transfers annotator-conditioned classifier representations directly into a generative model. This design enables explanation generation aligned with individual annotator perspectives. Our results show that incorporating explanation modeling substantially improves predictive performance over a baseline annotator-aware classifier, with the prefixed bridge approach achieving more stable label alignment and higher semantic consistency, while the post-hoc approach yields stronger lexical similarity. These findings indicate that modeling explanations as expressions of fine-grained perspective provides a richer and more faithful representation of disagreement. The proposed approaches advance perspectivist modeling by integrating annotator-specific rationales into both predictive and generative components.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个联合建模标注者特定标签预测和解释的框架，通过User Passport机制整合标注者信息，使用两种解释器架构生成与个体视角对齐的解释，显著提升了预测性能。
AI.motivation: 标注者的理由提供了个体视角的细粒度信号，单纯利用分散化的标签进行视角建模是不够的，需要将标注者的解释整合到模型中以获得更丰富和忠实的分歧表示。
AI.method: 提出了结合User Passport机制的框架，在表示层面整合标注者身份和人口统计元数据；引入两种解释器架构：基于提示的后置解释器和前置桥接解释器，将标注者条件化的分类器表示直接传递给生成模型。
AI.result: 纳入解释建模后预测性能显著超越基线标注感知分类器，前置桥接方法获得了更稳定的标签对齐和更高语义一致性，后置方法产生了更强的词汇相似性。
AI.conclusion: 将解释建模为细粒度视角的表达提供了更丰富和忠实的分歧表示，所提出的方法通过将标注者特定理由整合到预测和生成组件中，推进了视角主义建模的发展。

title: Rethinking Cross-Domain Evaluation for Face Forgery Detection with Semantic Fine-grained Alignment and Mixture-of-Experts
comment: The source code is available at https://github.com/Yuhan-Luo/Semantic-Fine-grained-Alignment-and-Mixture-of-Experts
summary: Nowadays, visual data forgery detection plays an increasingly important role in social and economic security with the rapid development of generative models. Existing face forgery detectors still can't achieve satisfactory performance because of poor generalization ability across datasets. The key factor that led to this phenomenon is the lack of suitable metrics: the commonly used cross-dataset AUC metric fails to reveal an important issue where detection scores may shift significantly across data domains. To explicitly evaluate cross-domain score comparability, we propose \textbf{Cross-AUC}, an evaluation metric that can compute AUC across dataset pairs by contrasting real samples from one dataset with fake samples from another (and vice versa). It is interesting to find that evaluating representative detectors under the Cross-AUC metric reveals substantial performance drops, exposing an overlooked robustness problem. Besides, we also propose the novel framework \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{F}ine-grained \textbf{A}lignment and \textbf{M}ixture-of-Experts (\textbf{SFAM}), consisting of a patch-level image-text alignment module that enhances CLIP's sensitivity to manipulation artifacts, and the facial region mixture-of-experts module, which routes features from different facial regions to specialized experts for region-aware forgery analysis. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments on the public datasets prove that the proposed method achieves superior performance compared with the state-of-the-art methods with various suitable metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cross-AUC评估指标和SFAM框架，解决了跨数据集人脸伪造检测中的分数不可比性问题，并显著提升了检测性能。
AI.motivation: 随着生成模型的快速发展，视觉数据伪造检测在社会经济安全中显得日益重要。现有的人脸伪造检测器在跨数据集上泛化能力不足，主要原因是缺乏合适的评估指标来衡量不同数据域间检测分数的可比性问题。
AI.method: 1) 提出Cross-AUC评估指标，通过对比一个数据集的真实样本与另一个数据集的伪造样本来计算AUC；2) 提出SFAM框架，包含patch级图像-文本对齐模块增强CLIP对伪造痕迹的敏感性，以及面部区域专家混合模块实现区域感知的伪造分析。
AI.result: 实验表明，在Cross-AUC指标评估下，现有检测器性能大幅下降，暴露了被忽视的鲁棒性问题。所提出的SFAM方法在多个公共数据集上超越了最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Cross-AUC指标揭示了跨域伪造检测中的关键问题，SFAM框架通过语义细粒度对齐和专家混合机制有效提升了检测性能，为实际应用提供了更可靠的技术方案。

title: Fixation Sequences as Time Series: A Topological Approach to Dyslexia Detection
summary: Persistent homology, a method from topological data analysis, extracts robust, multi-scale features from data. It produces stable representations of time series by applying varying thresholds to their values (a process known as a \textit{filtration}). We develop novel filtrations for time series and introduce topological methods for the analysis of eye-tracking data, by interpreting fixation sequences as time series, and constructing ``hybrid models'' that combine topological features with traditional statistical features. We empirically evaluate our method by applying it to the task of dyslexia detection from eye-tracking-while-reading data using the Copenhagen Corpus, which contains scanpaths from dyslexic and non-dyslexic L1 and L2 readers. Our hybrid models outperform existing approaches that rely solely on traditional features, showing that persistent homology captures complementary information encoded in fixation sequences. The strength of these topological features is further underscored by their achieving performance comparable to established baseline methods. Importantly, our proposed filtrations outperform existing ones.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了一种新颖的时间序列过滤方法，结合拓扑数据分析中的持久同调技术，成功应用于眼部追踪数据的阅读障碍检测，混合模型显著优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统眼部追踪数据分析方法可能无法充分捕捉注视序列中蕴含的复杂拓扑结构信息，需要开发新方法来提取更具判别性的特征。
AI.method: 将注视序列解释为时间序列，开发新颖的过滤方法，使用持久同调提取拓扑特征，构建结合拓扑特征与传统统计特征的混合模型，在哥本哈根语料库上进行实证评估。
AI.result: 混合模型在阅读障碍检测任务上优于仅使用传统特征的方法，拓扑特征捕捉到了注视序列中的补充信息，性能可与现有基线方法相媲美，提出的新过滤方法优于现有的过滤方法。
AI.conclusion: 持久同调技术能够从眼部追踪数据中提取有价值的拓扑信息，与传统特征相结合可以提高阅读障碍检测的准确性，新开发的过滤方法为时间序列分析提供了有效工具。

title: Frozen LLMs as Map-Aware Spatio-Temporal Reasoners for Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated strong reasoning capabilities and attracted increasing research attention in the field of autonomous driving (AD). However, safe application of LLMs on AD perception and prediction still requires a thorough understanding of both the dynamic traffic agents and the static road infrastructure. To this end, this study introduces a framework to evaluate the capability of LLMs in understanding the behaviors of dynamic traffic agents and the topology of road networks. The framework leverages frozen LLMs as the reasoning engine, employing a traffic encoder to extract spatial-level scene features from observed trajectories of agents, while a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) encodes the local high-definition (HD) maps. To assess the intrinsic reasoning ability of LLMs, the extracted scene features are then transformed into LLM-compatible tokens via a reprogramming adapter. By residing the prediction burden with the LLMs, a simpler linear decoder is applied to output future trajectories. The framework enables a quantitative analysis of the influence of multi-modal information, especially the impact of map semantics on trajectory prediction accuracy, and allows seamless integration of frozen LLMs with minimal adaptation, thereby demonstrating strong generalizability across diverse LLM architectures and providing a unified platform for model evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个评估大型语言模型在自动驾驶中理解动态交通主体和静态道路网络能力的框架，通过将轨迹和地图信息转换为LLM兼容的token，实现LLM驱动的轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型展现出强大的推理能力，但要在自动驾驶中安全应用，需要深入理解动态交通主体行为和静态道路基础设施。目前缺乏对LLM在这些方面能力的系统性评估框架。
AI.method: 使用冻结的LLM作为推理引擎，通过交通编码器提取主体轨迹的空间场景特征，用轻量CNN编码局部高清地图，再通过重编程适配器将场景特征转换为LLM兼容token，最后用简单线性解码器输出未来轨迹。
AI.result: 框架能够定量分析多模态信息对轨迹预测的影响，特别是地图语义的作用，并且可以无缝集成各种LLM架构，展现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为评估LLM在自动驾驶感知和预测中的能力提供了统一平台，证明了冻结LLM只需最少的适配就能在自动驾驶任务中有效工作，为LLM在自动驾驶领域的安全应用奠定了基础。

title: Phonological Subspace Collapse Is Aetiology-Specific and Cross-Lingually Stable: Evidence from 3,374 Speakers
summary: We previously introduced a training-free method for dysarthria severity assessment based on d-prime separability of phonological feature subspaces in frozen self-supervised speech representations, validated on 890 speakers across 5 languages with HuBERT-base. Here, we scale the analysis to 3,374 speakers from 25 datasets spanning 12 languages and 5 aetiologies (Parkinson's disease, cerebral palsy, ALS, Down syndrome, and stroke), plus healthy controls, using 6 SSL backbones. We report three findings. First, aetiology-specific degradation profiles are distinguishable at the group level: 10 of 13 features yield large effect sizes (epsilon-squared > 0.14, Holm-corrected p < 0.001), with Parkinson's disease separable from the articulatory execution group at Cohen's d = 0.83; individual-level classification remains limited (22.6% macro F1). Second, profiles show cross-lingual profile-shape stability: cosine similarity of 5-dimensional consonant d-prime profiles exceeds 0.95 across the languages available for each aetiology. Absolute d-prime magnitudes are not cross-lingually calibrated, so the method supports language-independent phenotyping of degradation patterns but requires within-corpus calibration for absolute severity interpretation. Third, the method is architecture-independent: all 6 backbones produce monotonic severity gradients with inter-model agreement exceeding rho = 0.77. Fixed-token d-prime estimation preserves the severity correlation (rho = -0.733 at 200 tokens per class), confirming that the signal is not a token-count artefact. These results support phonological subspace analysis as a robust, training-free framework for aetiology-aware dysarthria characterisation, with evidence of cross-lingual profile-shape stability and cross-backbone robustness in the represented sample.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过扩大样本和模型多样性，验证了基于语音学特征子空间d-prime可分性的训练free方法在构音障碍严重程度评估中的鲁棒性，发现了病因特异性的退化模式具有跨语言形状稳定性，且方法具有架构独立性。
AI.motivation: 构音障碍严重程度评估在临床实践中有重要意义，但现有方法通常需要大量训练数据且缺乏跨语言和跨模型的普适性。作者希望验证其之前提出的训练free方法在大规模多语言、多病因数据上的稳定性和有效性。
AI.method: 基于自监督语音表示中语音学特征子空间的d-prime可分性分析，涵盖3374名说话者、25个数据集、12种语言和5种病因，使用6种不同的SSL骨干网络进行验证，包括群体水平效应分析、个体分类和跨语言相关性评估。
AI.result: 发现1) 病因特异性退化模式在群体水平可区分，10/13特征显示大效应量(epsilon²>0.14)，但个体分类效果有限(22.6%宏F1)；2) 跨语言形状稳定性高(余弦相似度>0.95)，但绝对d-prime值需语料内校准；3) 方法架构独立，6种骨干网络均产生单调严重性梯度(一致性rho>0.77)。
AI.conclusion: 语音学子空间分析是一个鲁棒的训练free框架，可用于病因感知的构音障碍特征化，具有跨语言模式形状稳定性和跨骨干网络鲁棒性，为多语言构音障碍评估提供了可靠工具。

title: VFM$^{4}$SDG: Unveiling the Power of VFMs for Single-Domain Generalized Object Detection
summary: In real-world scenarios, continual changes in weather, illumination, and imaging conditions cause significant domain shifts, leading detectors trained on a single source domain to degrade severely in unseen environments. Existing single-domain generalized object detection (SDGOD) methods mainly rely on data augmentation or domain-invariant representation learning, but pay limited attention to detector mechanisms, leaving clear limitations under complex domain shifts. Through analytical experiments, we find that performance degradation is dominated by increasing missed detections, which fundamentally arises from reduced cross-domain stability of the detector: object-background and inter-instance relations become less stable in the encoding stage, while semantic-spatial alignment of query representations also becomes harder to maintain in the decoding stage. To this end, we propose VFM$^{4}$SDG, a dual-prior learning framework for SDGOD, which introduces a frozen vision foundation model (VFM) as a transferable cross-domain stability prior into detector representation learning and query modeling. In the encoding stage, we propose Cross-domain Stable Relational Prior Distillation to enhance the robustness of object-background and inter-instance relational modeling. In the decoding stage, we propose Semantic-Contextual Prior-based Query Enhancement, which injects category-level semantic prototypes and global visual context into queries to improve their semantic recognition and spatial localization stability in unseen domains. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method consistently outperforms existing SOTA methods on standard SDGOD benchmarks and two mainstream DETR-based detectors, demonstrating its effectiveness, robustness, and generality.

AI.tldr: VFM^4SDG是一种用于单域泛化目标检测的双先验学习框架，通过引入视觉基础模型作为跨域稳定性先验，显著提升了检测器在未知环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中天气、光照和成像条件的持续变化会导致严重的域偏移，使在单一源域训练的检测器在未知环境中性能严重下降。现有方法主要依赖数据增强或域不变表示学习，但忽略了检测器机制本身在复杂域偏移下的局限性。
AI.method: 提出双先验学习框架VFM^4SDG，将冻结的视觉基础模型作为可迁移的跨域稳定性先验。在编码阶段，通过跨域稳定关系先验蒸馏增强目标-背景和实例间关系建模的鲁棒性；在解码阶段，基于语义-上下文先验的查询增强通过向查询注入类别级语义原型和全局视觉上下文来提高语义识别和空间定位的稳定性。
AI.result: 在标准SDGOD基准测试和两种主流DETR检测器上的大量实验表明，所提方法持续超越现有最先进方法，证明了其有效性、鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 性能下降主要由漏检率增加主导，根本原因是检测器跨域稳定性降低。VFM^4SDG框架通过视觉基础模型先验有效解决了这一问题，为单域泛化目标检测提供了新的解决思路。

title: From If-Statements to ML Pipelines: Revisiting Bias in Code-Generation
summary: Prior work evaluates code generation bias primarily through simple conditional statements, which represent only a narrow slice of real-world programming and reveal solely overt, explicitly encoded bias. We demonstrate that this approach dramatically underestimates bias in practice by examining a more realistic task: generating machine learning (ML) pipelines. Testing both code-specialized and general-instruction large language models, we find that generated pipelines exhibit significant bias during feature selection. Sensitive attributes appear in 87.7% of cases on average, despite models demonstrably excluding irrelevant features (e.g., including "race" while dropping "favorite color" for credit scoring). This bias is substantially more prevalent than that captured by conditional statements, where sensitive attributes appear in only 59.2% of cases. These findings are robust across prompt mitigation strategies, varying numbers of attributes, and different pipeline difficulty levels. Our results challenge simple conditionals as valid proxies for bias evaluation and suggest current benchmarks underestimate bias risk in practical deployments.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，传统的简单条件语句测试严重低估了代码生成中的偏见，通过更真实的机器学习管道生成任务发现，敏感属性出现的频率（87.7%）远高于条件语句测试（59.2%）。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要通过简单条件语句评估代码生成偏见，但这仅代表了现实编程的极小部分，只能发现显性的、明确编码的偏见，无法全面反映实际应用中的偏见程度。
AI.method: 通过生成机器学习管道这一更真实的任务进行测试，比较了代码专门化和通用指令大语言模型的表现，并考察了提示词缓解策略、属性数量变化和管道难度等级的影响。
AI.result: 生成的管道在特征选择阶段表现出显著偏见，敏感属性平均出现在87.7%的案例中，远高于条件语句测试的59.2%，且这种偏见在不同条件下均稳定存在。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果挑战了简单条件语句作为偏见评估有效代理的做法，表明当前基准测试低估了实际部署中的偏见风险，需要采用更贴近实际应用场景的评估方法。

title: Gmd: Gaussian mixture descriptor for pair matching of 3D fragments
comment: 24 pages, 10 figures. Published in Multimedia Systems
summary: In the automatic reassembly of fragments acquired using laser scanners to reconstruct objects, a crucial step is the matching of fractured surfaces. In this paper, we propose a novel local descriptor that uses the Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) to fit the distribution of points, allowing for the description and matching of fractured surfaces of fragments. Our method involves dividing a local surface patch into concave and convex regions for estimating the k value of GMM. Then the final Gaussian Mixture Descriptor (GMD) of the fractured surface is formed by merging the regional GMDs. To measure the similarities between GMDs for determining adjacent fragments, we employ the L2 distance and align the fragments using Random Sample Consensus (RANSAC) and Iterative Closest Point (ICP). The extensive experiments on real-scanned public datasets and Terracotta datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach; furthermore, the comparisons with several existing methods also validate the advantage of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出基于高斯混合模型(GMM)的新型局部描述符(GMD)用于文物碎片断裂面匹配，通过分割凹凸区域估计GMM参数，结合L2距离、RANSAC和ICP实现碎片自动拼接。
AI.motivation: 激光扫描获取的碎片自动重组中，断裂面匹配是关键步骤，现有方法在描述和匹配复杂断裂面方面存在局限。
AI.method: 将局部表面补丁分为凹凸区域估计GMM的k值，合并区域GMD形成最终描述符，采用L2距离测量相似性，使用RANSAC和ICP对齐碎片。
AI.result: 在真实扫描公开数据集和兵马俑数据集上的广泛实验证明了方法的有效性，与现有方法对比验证了优势。
AI.conclusion: 基于GMM的高斯混合描述符能有效描述和匹配碎片断裂面，为文物数字化保护提供了可靠的自动拼接解决方案。

title: Beyond N-gram: Data-Aware X-GRAM Extraction for Efficient Embedding Parameter Scaling
summary: Large token-indexed lookup tables provide a compute-decoupled scaling path, but their practical gains are often limited by poor parameter efficiency and rapid memory growth. We attribute these limitations to Zipfian under-training of the long tail, heterogeneous demand across layers, and "slot collapse" that produces redundant embeddings. To address this, we propose X-GRAM, a frequency-aware dynamic token-injection framework. X-GRAM employs hybrid hashing and alias mixing to compress the tail while preserving head capacity, and refines retrieved vectors via normalized SwiGLU ShortConv to extract diverse local n-gram features. These signals are integrated into attention value streams and inter-layer residuals using depth-aware gating, effectively aligning static memory with dynamic context. This design introduces a memory-centric scaling axis that decouples model capacity from FLOPs. Extensive evaluations at the 0.73B and 1.15B scales show that X-GRAM improves average accuracy by as much as 4.4 points over the vanilla backbone and 3.2 points over strong retrieval baselines, while using substantially smaller tables in the 50% configuration. Overall, by decoupling capacity from compute through efficient memory management, X-GRAM offers a scalable and practical paradigm for future memory-augmented architectures. Code aviliable in https://github.com/Longyichen/X-gram.

AI.tldr: X-GRAM是一种频率感知的动态token注入框架，通过混合哈希和别名混合压缩尾部token，使用归一化SwiGLU短卷积提取n-gram特征，显著提升了小规模模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的大规模token索引查找表面临参数效率低、内存增长快的问题，主要原因是Zipfian长尾欠训练、层间需求异构性和插槽冗余导致的嵌入向量重复。
AI.method: X-GRAM采用混合哈希和别名混合技术压缩尾部token，通过归一化SwiGLU短卷积提取多样的局部n-gram特征，并利用深度感知门将信号整合到注意力值流和层间残差中。
AI.result: 在0.73B和1.15B规模的评估中，X-GRAM相比原始骨干网络平均提升准确率4.4个百分点，相比强检索基线提升3.2个百分点，同时使用更小的表结构(50%配置)。
AI.conclusion: X-GRAM通过有效内存管理实现容量与计算的解耦，为未来的内存增强架构提供了一个可扩展且实用的范式。

title: Seeing Isn't Believing: Uncovering Blind Spots in Evaluator Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used to evaluate outputs of other models, for image-to-text (I2T) tasks such as visual question answering, and text-to-image (T2I) generation tasks. Despite this growing reliance, the reliability of these Evaluator VLMs remains under explored. In this work, we systematically evaluate the reliability of Evaluator VLMs across both I2T and T2I tasks. We introduce targeted perturbations that degrade output quality along key error dimensions, including object hallucinations, spatial reasoning, factual grounding, and visual fidelity. These perturbations test whether Evaluator VLMs can reliably account for these quality degrading errors in their evaluations. Using a comprehensive benchmark of over 4000 perturbed instances spanning 40 perturbation dimensions, we evaluate 4 prominent VLMs using single-answer scoring, pairwise comparison, and reference-guided paradigms. Our findings reveal that current VLM evaluators exhibit substantial blind spots: they often fail to detect perturbed outputs - in some cases exceeding 50%, struggle particularly with fine-grained compositional and spatial errors, and are often insensitive to hallucinated content that contradicts the input image. Pairwise comparison proves more reliable, though failure rates persist. These results highlight the unreliable nature of current Evaluator VLMs and urge caution in their deployment for benchmarking and development decisions. Code and data have been made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过系统评估发现，当前用于评估其他模型输出的大型视觉语言模型存在严重的可靠性问题，它们经常无法检测到图像质量退化错误，尤其是在对象幻觉、空间推理和视觉 fidelity 等方面。
AI.motivation: 随着大型视觉语言模型(VLMs)越来越多地被用于评估其他模型的输出结果，特别是在图像到文本和文本到图像任务中，但这些评估器模型的可靠性尚未得到充分探索，这可能导致基于错误评估做出错误的基准测试和开发决策。
AI.method: 研究人员引入了有针对性的扰动来降低输出质量，涵盖对象幻觉、空间推理、事实基础和视觉逼真度等关键错误维度。他们使用超过4000个扰动实例和40个扰动维度的综合基准，对4个主要VLM进行单答案评分、成对比较和参考引导评估。
AI.result: 研究发现当前VLM评估器存在显著盲点：经常无法检测到扰动输出（某些情况下超过50%），特别在细粒度组合和空间错误方面表现不佳，且对与输入图像矛盾的幻觉内容不敏感。成对比较相对更可靠，但失败率仍然存在。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了当前评估器VLM的不可靠性，呼吁在将其用于基准测试和开发决策时需要谨慎。研究团队已公开代码和数据供其他研究者使用。

title: AEL: Agent Evolving Learning for Open-Ended Environments
summary: LLM agents increasingly operate in open-ended environments spanning hundreds of sequential episodes, yet they remain largely stateless: each task is solved from scratch without converting past experience into better future behavior. The central obstacle is not \emph{what} to remember but \emph{how to use} what has been remembered, including which retrieval policy to apply, how to interpret prior outcomes, and when the current strategy itself must change. We introduce \emph{Agent Evolving Learning} (\ael{}), a two-timescale framework that addresses this obstacle. At the fast timescale, a Thompson Sampling bandit learns which memory retrieval policy to apply at each episode; at the slow timescale, LLM-driven reflection diagnoses failure patterns and injects causal insights into the agent's decision prompt, giving it an interpretive frame for the evidence it retrieves. On a sequential portfolio benchmark (10 sector-diverse tickers, 208 episodes, 5 random seeds), \ael{} achieves a Sharpe ratio of 2.13$\pm$0.47, outperforming five published self-improving methods and all non-LLM baselines while maintaining the lowest variance among all LLM-based approaches. A nine-variant ablation reveals a ``less is more'' pattern: memory and reflection together produce a 58\% cumulative improvement over the stateless baseline, yet every additional mechanism we test (planner evolution, per-tool selection, cold-start initialization, skill extraction, and three credit assignment methods) \emph{degrades} performance. This demonstrates that the bottleneck in agent self-improvement is \emph{self-diagnosing how to use} experience rather than adding architectural complexity. Code and data: https://github.com/WujiangXu/AEL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agent Evolving Learning (AEL)框架，通过双时间尺度的记忆使用策略和反思机制，让LLM智能体能够有效利用过往经验，在投资组合任务中实现显著更好的持续学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在开放式环境中运行时基本是无状态的，无法将过去经验转化为更好的未来行为。主要瓶颈不在于记忆什么，而在于如何有效使用记忆内容，包括检索策略选择、结果解释和策略适应性调整。
AI.method: AEL采用双时间尺度框架：快速时间尺度下使用Thompson Sampling老虎机学习每集episode的记忆检索策略；慢速时间尺度下LLM驱动的反思机制诊断失败模式，将因果洞察注入到智能体决策提示中，为检索到的证据提供解释框架。
AI.result: 在投资组合基准测试(10个板块股票，208个episode)中，AEL达到2.13±0.47的夏普比率，优于5种已发布的自改进方法和所有非LLM基线，且在LLM方法中方差最低。消融实验显示记忆与反思的简单组合比状态less基线改进58%，而额外机制反而降低性能。
AI.conclusion: 智能体自改进的瓶颈在于如何自我诊断和使用经验，而非增加架构复杂性。研究表明适度的记忆使用策略和反思机制比复杂的监督学习或规划更有效。

title: Attention-based multiple instance learning for predominant growth pattern prediction in lung adenocarcinoma wsi using foundation models
summary: Lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD) grading depends on accurately identifying growth patterns, which are indicators of prognosis and can influence treatment decisions. Common deep learning approaches to determine the predominant pattern rely on patch-level classification or segmentation, requiring extensive annotations. This study proposes an attention-based multiple instance learning (ABMIL) framework to predict the predominant LUAD growth pattern at the whole slide level to reduce annotation burden. Our approach integrates pretrained pathology foundation models as patch encoders, used either frozen or fine-tuned on annotated patches, to extract discriminative features that are aggregated through attention mechanisms. Experiments show that fine-tuned encoders improve performance, with Prov-GigaPath achieving the highest agreement (\k{appa} = 0.699) under ABMIL. Compared to simple patch-aggregation baselines, ABMIL yields more robust predictions by leveraging slide-level supervision and spatial attention. Future work will extend this framework to estimate the full distribution of growth patterns and validate performance on external cohorts.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于注意力的多实例学习框架，用于在整张切片级别预测肺腺癌主要生长模式，显著减少标注负担。
AI.motivation: 肺腺癌分级需要准确识别生长模式，这对预后评估和治疗决策具有重要意义。现有深度学习方法通常基于切片级别的分类或分割，需要大量标注，临床应用受限。
AI.method: ABMIL框架整合预训练病理基础模型作为编码器（可冻结或微调），通过注意力机制提取和聚合特征，在整张切片级别进行预测，降低了对详细标注的依赖。
AI.result: 实验表明微调的编码器性能提升，其中Prov-GigaPath在ABMIL下达到最高一致性（κ=0.699）。相比简单的切片聚合基线，ABMIL利用切片级监督和空间注意力产生更稳健的预测。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效减少了标注需求，提供了更可靠的肺腺癌生长模式预测。未来工作将扩展到生长模式完整分布估计并在外部队列中验证性能。

title: StructMem: Structured Memory for Long-Horizon Behavior in LLMs
summary: Long-term conversational agents need memory systems that capture relationships between events, not merely isolated facts, to support temporal reasoning and multi-hop question answering. Current approaches face a fundamental trade-off: flat memory is efficient but fails to model relational structure, while graph-based memory enables structured reasoning at the cost of expensive and fragile construction. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{StructMem}, a structure-enriched hierarchical memory framework that preserves event-level bindings and induces cross-event connections. By temporally anchoring dual perspectives and performing periodic semantic consolidation, StructMem improves temporal reasoning and multi-hop performance on \texttt{LoCoMo}, while substantially reducing token usage, API calls, and runtime compared to prior memory systems, see https://github.com/zjunlp/LightMem .

AI.tldr: 结构化记忆框架
AI.motivation: 长期对话代理需要记忆系统来捕捉事件间的关系，而不仅仅是孤立的事实，以支持时间推理和多跳问答。现有方法面临基本权衡：扁平记忆高效但无法建模关系结构，而基于图的记忆能实现结构化推理但构建成本高昂且脆弱。
AI.method: 提出了StructMem，一个结构化的分层记忆框架，该框架保留事件级绑定并诱导跨事件连接。通过时间锚定双视角和执行周期性语义整合来实现。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo数据集上改善了时间推理和多跳性能，同时大幅减少了令牌使用量、API调用和运行时相比之前的记忆系统。
AI.conclusion: StructMem成功解决了记忆系统的效率与结构化表达之间的权衡问题，为长期对话代理提供了更有效的记忆解决方案。

title: Component-Based Out-of-Distribution Detection
summary: Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection requires sensitivity to subtle shifts without overreacting to natural In-Distribution (ID) diversity. However, from the viewpoint of detection granularity, global representation inevitably suppress local OOD cues, while patch-based methods are unstable due to entangled spurious-correlation and noise. And neither them is effective in detecting compositional OODs composed of valid ID components. Inspired by recognition-by-components theory, we present a training-free Component-Based OOD Detection (CoOD) framework that addresses the existing limitations by decomposing inputs into functional components. To instantiate CoOD, we derive Component Shift Score (CSS) to detect local appearance shifts, and Compositional Consistency Score (CCS) to identify cross-component compositional inconsistencies. Empirically, CoOD achieves consistent improvements on both coarse- and fine-grained OOD detection.

AI.tldr: 基于组件的分布式外检测框架CoOD，无需训练即可有效检测外观偏移和组合不一致性，在粗粒度和细粒度OOD检测中均取得改进。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法存在粒度问题：全局表示抑制局部线索，补丁方法因伪相关和噪声而不稳定，且难以检测由有效ID组件组成的组合性OOD样本。
AI.method: 提出训练免费的组件级OOD检测框架CoOD，通过分解输入为功能性组件，推导组件偏移分数(CSS)检测局部外观偏移，组合一致性分数(CCS)识别跨组件组合不一致性。
AI.result: CoOD在粗粒度和细粒度OOD检测任务上均取得了一致的改进效果，证明了组件级方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于组件的分解方法能够有效解决传统OOD检测的粒度问题，无需训练即可同时处理外观偏移和组合不一致性的检测，是OOD检测领域的一种新思路。

title: Why are all LLMs Obsessed with Japanese Culture? On the Hidden Cultural and Regional Biases of LLMs
summary: LLMs have been showing limitations when it comes to cultural coverage and competence, and in some cases show regional biases such as amplifying Western and Anglocentric viewpoints. While there have been works analysing the cultural capabilities of LLMs, there has not been specific work on highlighting LLM regional preferences when it comes to cultural-related questions. In this work, we propose a new dataset based on a comprehensive taxonomy of Culture-Related Open Questions (CROQ). The results show that, contrary to previous cultural bias work, LLMs show a clear tendency towards countries such as Japan. Moveover, our results show that when prompting in languages such as English or other high-resource ones, LLMs tend to provide more diverse outputs and show less inclinations towards answering questions highlighting countries for which the input language is an official language. Finally, we also investigate at which point of LLM training this cultural bias emerges, with our results suggesting that the first clear signs appear after supervised fine-tuning, and not during pre-training.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过构建文化相关问题数据集CROQ，发现LLM在处理文化相关问题时存在明显的地区偏好性，特别是倾向于日本而非西方或盎格鲁中心观点，并揭示了这种偏见主要出现在监督微调阶段。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已表明LLM在文化覆盖和胜任力方面存在局限，但缺乏具体分析LLM在文化相关问题上的地区偏好的研究，需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 研究者基于文化相关开放问题的综合分类法构建了新的CROQ数据集，通过该数据集评估LLM的文化偏好，并分析了不同语言输入对输出多样性的影响，同时追踪了文化偏见在训练过程中的出现时机。
AI.result: 研究发现LLM显示出对日本的明显偏好趋势；使用英语或其他高资源语言提示时，LLM输出更加多样化且较少倾向于突出输入语言为官方语言的国家；文化偏见在监督微调阶段首次出现，而非预训练阶段。
AI.conclusion: 与传统认为的西方中心偏见不同，LLM确实存在地区文化偏好，但这种偏好并非训练早期就形成，而是在监督微调阶段才明显出现，这对理解LLM的文化偏见机制具有重要意义。

title: Deep kernel video approximation for unsupervised action segmentation
summary: This work focuses on per-video unsupervised action segmentation, which is of interest to applications where storing large datasets is either not possible, or nor permitted. We propose to segment videos by learning in deep kernel space, to approximate the underlying frame distribution, as closely as possible. To define this closeness metric between the original video distribution and its approximation, we rely on maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) which is a geometry-preserving metric in distribution space, and thus gives more reliable estimates. Moreover, unlike the commonly used optimal transport metric, MMD is both easier to optimize, and faster. We choose to use neural tangent kernels (NTKs) to define the kernel space where MMD operates, because of their improved descriptive power as opposed to fixed kernels. And, also, because NTKs sidestep the trivial solution, when jointly learning the inputs (video approximation) and the kernel function. Finally, we show competitive results when compared to state-of-the-art per-video methods, on six standard benchmarks. Additionally, our method has higher F1 scores than prior agglomerative work, when the number of segments is unknown.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度核空间学习的无监督动作分割方法，通过MMD度量和NTK核函数实现高性能的单视频动作分割。
AI.motivation: 针对在无法存储或允许存储大型数据集的应用场景，需要开发单视频无监督动作分割方法。现有方法存在优化困难、计算效率低等问题。
AI.method: 提出在深度核空间中学习视频分割，使用最大均值差异(MMD)作为分布距离度量，采用神经正切核(NTK)作为核函数以增强描述能力并避免平凡解。
AI.result: 在六个标准基准测试上取得了与最先进单视频方法相当的结果，在段落数量未知时优于先前的聚类方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法结合MMD度量的几何保持特性和NTK的强描述能力，为单视频无监督动作分割提供了一个有效且高效的解决方案。

title: AUDITA: A New Dataset to Audit Humans vs. AI Skill at Audio QA
summary: Existing audio question answering benchmarks largely emphasize sound event classification or caption-grounded queries, often enabling models to succeed through shortcut strategies, short-duration cues, lexical priors, dataset-specific biases, or even bypassing audio via metadata and captions rather than genuine reasoning Thus, we present AUDITA (Audio Understanding from Diverse Internet Trivia Authors), a large-scale, real-world benchmark to rigorously evaluate audio reasoning beyond surface-level acoustic recognition. AUDITA comprises carefully curated, human-authored trivia questions grounded in real-world audio, designed to stress robust auditory reasoning through challenging distractors and long-range temporal dependencies, using probing queries that cannot be answered from isolated text or sound cues alone. Human average accuracy of 32.13% shows both the challenge of the task while demonstrating meaningful comprehension of the audio. In stark contrast, state of-the-art audio question answering models perform poorly, with average accuracy below 8.86%. Beyond raw accuracy, we apply Item Response Theory (IRT) to estimate latent proficiency, question difficulty, and expose systematic deficiencies of the models and data.

AI.tldr: AUDITA是一个新的大规模音频问答基准测试，通过真实世界的音频和人类编写的推理问题，严格评估模型的音频理解能力，现有模型在该测试上的准确率低于8.86%，远低于人类的32.13%。
AI.motivation: 现有的音频问答基准主要关注声音事件分类或基于字幕的查询，模型可以通过捷径策略、短时提示、词汇先验或数据集偏差来获得成功，甚至绕过音频直接使用元数据和字幕，缺乏真正的音频推理能力评估。
AI.method: 创建AUDITA基准数据集，包含精心策划的人类编写的、基于真实世界音频的问答问题，通过具有挑战性的干扰项和长期时间依赖性来测试鲁棒的听觉推理能力，使用无法仅从孤立文本或声音线索回答的探测查询，并引入项目反应理论(IRT)来评估模型表现。
AI.result: 人类在AUDITA上的平均准确率为32.13%，而最先进的音频问答模型平均准确率低于8.86%，IRT分析揭示了模型和数据的系统性缺陷。
AI.conclusion: AUDITA成功地提供了一个严格评估深度音频推理能力的基准，暴露了现有模型在复杂音频理解任务上的不足，为未来音频AI模型的发展提供了新的挑战方向。

title: CHRep: Cross-modal Histology Representation and Post-hoc Calibration for Spatial Gene Expression Prediction
summary: Spatial transcriptomics (ST) enables spatially resolved gene profiling but remains expensive and low-throughput, limiting large-cohort studies and routine clinical use. Predicting spatial gene expression from routine hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) slides is a promising alternative, yet under realistic leave-one-slide-out evaluation, existing models often suffer from slide-level appearance shifts and regression-driven over-smoothing that suppress biologically meaningful variation. CHRep is a two-phase framework for robust histology-to-expression prediction. In the training phase, CHRep learns a structure-aware representation by jointly optimizing correlation-aware regression, symmetric image-expression alignment, and coordinate-induced spatial topology regularization. In the inference phase, cross-slide robustness is improved without backbone fine-tuning through a lightweight calibration module trained on the training slides, which combines a non-parametric estimate from a training gallery with a magnitude-regularized correction module. Unlike prior embedding-alignment or retrieval-based transfer methods that rely on a single prediction route, CHRep couples topology-preserving representation learning with post-hoc calibration, enabling stable neighborhood retrieval and controlled bias correction under slide-level shifts. Across the three cohorts, CHRep consistently improves gene-wise correlation under leave-one-slide-out evaluation, with the largest gains observed on Alex+10x. Relative to HAGE, the Pearson correlation coefficient on all considered genes [PCC(ACG)] increases by 4.0% on cSCC and 9.8% on HER2+. Relative to mclSTExp, PCC(ACG) further improves by 39.5% on Alex+10x, together with 9.7% and 9.0% reductions in mean squared error (MSE) and mean absolute error (MAE), respectively.

AI.tldr: CHRep是一个双阶段框架，通过结构感知表示学习和轻量校准模块，解决了从H&E病理图像预测基因表达时的切片级偏移和过平滑问题，显著提升了跨切片预测的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 空间转录组学技术成本高昂且通量低，限制了大样本研究和临床应用。从常规H&E病理图像预测基因表达是可行的替代方案，但现有模型在留一切片评估中存在切片级外观偏移和回归驱动的过平滑问题，抑制了生物学上有意义的变异。
AI.method: CHRep采用两阶段框架：训练阶段通过联合优化相关性感知回归、对称图像表达对齐和坐标诱导空间拓扑正则化学习结构感知表示；推理阶段通过轻量校准模块提升跨切片鲁棒性，该模块结合训练库的非参数估计和幅度正则化修正模块，无需微调主干网络。
AI.result: 在三个队列的留一切片评估中，CHRep在基因相关性上表现一致提升，在Alex+10x上增益最大。相比HAGE，在cSCC和HER2+队列中全基因PCC分别提升4.0%和9.8%；相比mclSTExp，在Alex+10x上PCC提升39.5%，MSE和MAE分别降低9.7%和9.0%。
AI.conclusion: CHRep通过结合拓扑保持表示学习和后验校准，实现了在切片级偏移下的稳定邻域检索和可控偏置校正，为从常规病理图像预测空间基因表达提供了更鲁棒、准确的解决方案。

title: Misinformation Span Detection in Videos via Audio Transcripts
summary:
Online misinformation is one of the most challenging issues lately, yielding severe consequences, including political polarization, attacks on democracy, and public health risks. Misinformation manifests in any platform with a large user base, including online social networks and messaging apps. It permeates all media and content forms, including images, text, audio, and video. Distinctly, video-based misinformation represents a multifaceted challenge for fact-checkers, given the ease with which individuals can record and upload videos on various video-sharing platforms. Previous research efforts investigated detecting video-based misinformation, focusing on whether a video shares misinformation or not on a video level. While this approach is useful, it only provides a limited and non-easily interpretable view of the problem given that it does not provide an additional context of when misinformation occurs within videos and what content (i.e., claims) are responsible for the video's misinformation nature.
  In this work, we attempt to bridge this research gap by creating two novel datasets that allow us to explore misinformation detection on videos via audio transcripts, focusing on identifying the span of videos that are responsible for the video's misinformation claim (misinformation span detection). We present two new datasets for this task. We transcribe each video's audio to text, identifying the video segment in which the misinformation claims appears, resulting in two datasets of more than 500 videos with over 2,400 segments containing annotated fact-checked claims. Then, we employ classifiers built with state-of-the-art language models, and our results show that we can identify in which part of a video there is misinformation with an F1 score of 0.68. We make publicly available our annotated datasets. We also release all transcripts, audio and videos.

AI.tldr: 该研究创建了两个新的视频虚假信息数据集，专注于通过音频转录检测视频中虚假信息的具体片段位置，使用最先进的语言模型达到了0.68的F1分数。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频虚假信息检测方法只能判断整个视频是否包含虚假信息，无法确定虚假信息在视频中的具体位置和相关内容，缺乏可解释性，这对事实核查人员来说是重要的局限性。
AI.method: 研究者转录了500多个视频的音频为文本，标注了2400多个经过事实核查的虚假信息片段，构建了两个新数据集。然后使用基于最先进语言模型的分类器来检测视频中虚假信息出现的具体段落。
AI.result: 能够识别视频中虚假信息出现的位置，F1分数达到0.68。研究者公开发布了标注数据集、转录文本、音频和视频资源。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了视频虚假信息位置检测的研究空白，为事实核查人员提供了更细粒度的检测工具，提高了虚假信息检测的可解释性，并为后续相关研究提供了宝贵的资源。

title: OmniFit: Multi-modal 3D Body Fitting via Scale-agnostic Dense Landmark Prediction
summary: Fitting an underlying body model to 3D clothed human assets has been extensively studied, yet most approaches focus on either single-modal inputs such as point clouds or multi-view images alone, often requiring a known metric scale. This constraint is frequently impractical, especially for AI-generated assets where scale distortion is common. We propose OmniFit, a method that can seamlessly handle diverse multi-modal inputs, including full scans, partial depth observations, and image captures, while remaining scale-agnostic for both real and synthetic assets. Our key innovation is a simple yet effective conditional transformer decoder that directly maps surface points to dense body landmarks, which are then used for SMPL-X parameter fitting. In addition, an optional plug-and-play image adapter incorporates visual cues to compensate for missing geometric information. We further introduce a dedicated scale predictor that rescales subjects to canonical body proportions. OmniFit substantially outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 57.1 to 80.9 percent across daily and loose clothing scenarios. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first body fitting method to surpass multi-view optimization baselines and the first to achieve millimeter-level accuracy on the CAPE and 4D-DRESS benchmarks.

AI.tldr: OmniFit提出了一种多模态、尺度无关的人体模型拟合方法，通过条件transformer解码器将表面点映射到密集身体标志点，实现了对真实和合成3D人物资产的高精度拟合。
AI.motivation: 现有的人体模型拟合方法大多局限于单一模态输入（如点云或多视图图像），且需要已知度量尺度，这对于AI生成的、常存在尺度扭曲的资产来说不切实际。
AI.method: 提出条件transformer解码器直接将表面点映射到密集身体标志点，通过可选的图像适配器融合视觉信息补偿几何信息缺失，并引入尺度预测器将人体重新缩放到标准比例。
AI.result: 在宽松服装场景下超越最新方法57.1-80.9%，首次超越多视图优化基线，并在CAPE和4D-DRESS基准测试中达到毫米级精度。
AI.conclusion: OmniFit是首个能够处理多模态输入、尺度无关的人体拟合方法，为AI生成的3D人物资产提供了实用的解决方案，显著提升了拟合精度。

title: SemEval-2026 Task 4: Narrative Story Similarity and Narrative Representation Learning
summary: We present the shared task on narrative similarity and narrative representation learning - NSNRL (pronounced "nass-na-rel"). The task operationalizes narrative similarity as a binary classification problem: determining which of two stories is more similar to an anchor story. We introduce a novel definition of narrative similarity, compatible with both narrative theory and intuitive judgment. Based on the similarity judgments collected under this concept, we also evaluate narrative embedding representations. We collected at least two annotations each for more than 1,000 story summary triples, with each annotation being backed by at least two annotators in agreement. This paper describes the sampling and annotation process for the dataset; further, we give an overview of the submitted systems and the techniques they employ. We received a total of 71 final submissions from 46 teams across our two tracks. In our triple-based classification setup, LLM ensembles make up many of the top-scoring systems, while in the embedding setup, systems with pre- and post-processing on pretrained embedding models perform about on par with custom fine-tuned solutions. Our analysis identifies potential headroom for improvement of automated systems in both tracks. The task website includes visualizations of embeddings alongside instance-level classification results for all teams.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了NSNRL共享任务，通过故事三元组分类来评估叙事相似性和叙事表示学习，收集了1000+标注数据，分析71个参赛系统后发现LLM集成方法在分类任务中表现最佳，而嵌入处理方法达到与精细调优相当的效果。
AI.motivation: 为了解决如何量化和计算叙事相似性这一基础问题，同时评估不同叙事嵌入表示的有效性，该研究提出了一种既符合叙事理论又符合直觉判断的叙事相似性新定义。
AI.method: 将叙事相似性操作化为二元分类问题，通过故事摘要三元组（锚点故事+两个候选故事）进行人工标注，构建包含1000+个三元组的数据集，并设立分类和嵌入两个赛道进行系统评估。
AI.result: 在分类赛道中，LLM集成系统占据高分排名；在嵌入赛道中，预训练模型的预处理和后处理技术与自定义精调方案性能相当，发现两个赛道都存在改进空间。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功建立了一个新颖的叙事相似性评估框架和数据集，为后续研究提供了基准，同时指出了当前自动化系统在叙事理解方面的局限性和发展潜力。

title: Sculpt4D: Generating 4D Shapes via Sparse-Attention Diffusion Transformers
summary: Recent breakthroughs in 3D generative modeling have yielded remarkable progress in static shape synthesis, yet high-fidelity dynamic 4D generation remains elusive, hindered by temporal artifacts and prohibitive computational demand. We present Sculpt4D, a native 4D generative framework that seamlessly integrates efficient temporal modeling into a pretrained 3D Diffusion Transformer (Hunyuan3D 2.1), thereby mitigating the scarcity of 4D training data. At its core lies a Block Sparse Attention mechanism that preserves object identity by anchoring to the initial frame while capturing rich motion dynamics via a time-decaying sparse mask. This design faithfully models complex spatiotemporal dependencies with high fidelity, while sidestepping the quadratic overhead of full attention and reducing network total computation by 56%. Consequently, Sculpt4D establishes a new state-of-the-art in temporally coherent 4D synthesis and charts a path toward efficient and scalable 4D generation.

AI.tldr: Sculpt4D是一个高效的4D生成框架，通过在预训练3D扩散模型中引入块稀疏注意力机制，实现了高保真动态4D内容生成，同时将计算开销降低56%。
AI.motivation: 当前3D生成建模在静态形状合成方面取得显著进展，但高保真动态4D生成仍然面临挑战，主要受限于时间伪影和过高的计算需求，同时4D训练数据稀缺。
AI.method: 该方法在预训练的3D扩散模型(Hunyuan3D 2.1)基础上，引入块稀疏注意力机制。该机制通过锚定初始帧保持物体身份一致性，并利用时间衰减稀疏掩码捕捉丰富的运动动态，有效建模了复杂的时空依赖关系。
AI.result: 在保持高保真度的同时，成功避免了全注意力的二次计算复杂度，将网络总计算量减少了56%，并在时间相干的4D合成任务中建立了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: Sculpt4D为高效可扩展的4D生成开辟了新路径，通过创新的时间建模策略有效解决了4D生成中的关键挑战，为未来的动态内容生成提供了重要的技术基础。

title: Machine Behavior in Relational Moral Dilemmas: Moral Rightness, Predicted Human Behavior, and Model Decisions
summary: Human moral judgment is context-dependent and modulated by interpersonal relationships. As large language models (LLMs) increasingly function as decision-support systems, determining whether they encode these social nuances is critical. We characterize machine behavior using the Whistleblower's Dilemma by varying two experimental dimensions: crime severity and relational closeness. Our study evaluates three distinct perspectives: (1) moral rightness (prescriptive norms), (2) predicted human behavior (descriptive social expectations), and (3) autonomous model decision-making. By analyzing the reasoning processes, we identify a clear cross-perspective divergence: while moral rightness remains consistently fairness-oriented, predicted human behavior shifts significantly toward loyalty as relational closeness increases. Crucially, model decisions align with moral rightness judgments rather than their own behavioral predictions. This inconsistency suggests that LLM decision-making prioritizes rigid, prescriptive rules over the social sensitivity present in their internal world-modeling, which poses a gap that may lead to significant misalignments in real-world deployments.

AI.tldr: Error
AI.motivation: Error
AI.method: Error
AI.result: Error
AI.conclusion: Error

title: Local Neighborhood Instability in Parametric Projections: Quantitative and Visual Analysis
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, LaTeX, to appear at the 17th International EuroVis Workshop on Visual Analytics
summary: Parametric projections let analysts embed new points in real time, but input variations from measurement noise or data drift can produce unpredictable shifts in the 2D layout. Whether and where a projection is locally stable remains largely unexamined. In this paper, we present a stability evaluation framework that probes parametric projections with Gaussian perturbations around selected anchor points and assesses how neighborhoods deform in the 2D embedding. Our approach combines quantitative measures of mean displacement, bias, and nearest-anchor assignment error with per-anchor visualizations of displacement vectors, local PCA ellipsoids, and Voronoi misassignment for detailed inspection. We demonstrate the framework's effectiveness on UMAP- and t-SNE-based neural projectors of varying network sizes and study the effect of Jacobian regularization as a gradient-based robustness strategy. We apply our framework to the MNIST and Fashion-MNIST datasets. The results show that our framework identifies unstable projection regions invisible to reconstruction error or neighborhood-preservation metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个评估参数化投影稳定性的框架，通过高斯扰动分析投影的局部稳定性，并提供了定量和可视化评估方法。
AI.motivation: 参数化投影允许分析师实时嵌入新数据点，但输入数据的变化（如测量噪声或数据漂移）会导致2D布局产生不可预测的偏移，然而投影是否在局部保持稳定这一问题尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出一个稳定性评估框架：在选定的锚点周围施加高斯扰动，分析2D嵌入中邻域的变形情况。结合平均位移、偏差、最近锚点分配误差等定量指标，以及位移向量、局部PCA椭球和Voronoi错误分配的逐锚点可视化进行详细检查。
AI.result: 在基于UMAP和t-SNE的不同规模神经网络投影器上验证了框架有效性，并研究了雅可比正则化作为基于梯度的鲁棒性策略。结果显示，该框架能识别出重构误差或邻域保持指标无法检测到的不稳定投影区域。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为评估参数化投影的局部稳定性提供了有效工具，能够揭示传统指标无法发现的投影不稳定区域，对于实际应用中的投影选择和优化具有重要意义。

title: Revisiting Non-Verbatim Memorization in Large Language Models: The Role of Entity Surface Forms
summary: Understanding what kinds of factual knowledge large language models (LLMs) memorize is essential for evaluating their reliability and limitations. Entity-based QA is a common framework for analyzing non-verbatim memorization, but typical evaluations query each entity using a single canonical surface form, making it difficult to disentangle fact memorization from access through a particular name. We introduce RedirectQA, an entity-based QA dataset that uses Wikipedia redirect information to associate Wikidata factual triples with categorized surface forms for each entity, including alternative names, abbreviations, spelling variants, and common erroneous forms. Across 13 LLMs, we examine surface-conditioned factual memorization and find that prediction outcomes often change when only the entity surface form changes. This inconsistency is category-dependent: models are more robust to minor orthographic variations than to larger lexical variations such as aliases and abbreviations. Frequency analyses further suggest that both entity- and surface-level frequencies are associated with accuracy, and that entity frequency often contributes beyond surface frequency. Overall, factual memorization appears neither purely surface-specific nor fully surface-invariant, highlighting the importance of surface-form diversity in evaluating non-verbatim memorization.

AI.tldr: 通过分析LLM在不同实体表面形式下的事实记忆表现，发现记忆既非完全取决于特定表形也非完全表形不变，表形多样性对评估记忆至关重要。
AI.motivation: 传统实体QA评估使用单一标准实体名称，难以区分事实记忆与特定名称访问的影响，无法准确评估LLM的事实记忆可靠性。
AI.method: 构建RedirectQA数据集，利用Wikipedia重定向信息将Wikidata事实三元组与各类实体表形（别名、缩写、拼写变体等）关联，在13个LLM上测试表面条件化的事实记忆。
AI.result: 预测结果随实体表形变化而变化，且存在类别依赖性：模型对微小拼写变体更稳健，对别名和缩写等大词汇变体更敏感；实体频率和表形频率都与准确性相关。
AI.conclusion: LLM的事实记忆既非完全表形特定也非完全表形不变，强调在评估非逐字记忆时需要考虑表形多样性的重要性。

title: DCMorph: Face Morphing via Dual-Stream Cross-Attention Diffusion
summary: Advancing face morphing attack techniques is crucial to anticipate evolving threats and develop robust defensive mechanisms for identity verification systems. This work introduces DCMorph, a dual-stream diffusion-based morphing framework that simultaneously operates at both identity conditioning and latent space levels. Unlike image-level methods suffering from blending artifacts or GAN-based approaches with limited reconstruction fidelity, DCMorph leverages identity-conditioned latent diffusion models through two mechanisms: (1) decoupled cross-attention interpolation that injects identity-specific features from both source faces into the denoising process, enabling explicit dual-identity conditioning absent in existing diffusion-based methods, and (2) DDIM inversion with spherical interpolation between inverted latent representations from both source faces, providing geometrically consistent initial latent representation that preserves structural attributes. Vulnerability analyses across four state-of-the-art face recognition systems demonstrate that DCMorph achieves the highest attack success rates compared to existing methods at both operational thresholds, while remaining challenging to detect by current morphing attack detection solutions.

AI.tldr: DCMorph是一种双流扩散型人脸变形攻击框架，通过身份条件特征和潜在空间的双重操作，实现了更高的人脸识别系统攻击成功率，且难以被现有检测方法发现。
AI.motivation: 为了应对不断演变的身份验证系统威胁，需要开发先进的人脸变形攻击技术，以帮助设计和构建更为强大的防御机制。
AI.method: DCMorph采用双流扩散架构：(1)通过解耦交叉注意力插值将两个源身份特征注入去噪过程，实现显式双身份条件；(2)使用DDIM反演和球面插值在源人脸的潜在表示间进行插值，保持结构属性的一致性。
AI.result: 在四个最先进的人脸识别系统上的漏洞分析表明，DCMorph在不同操作阈值下都比现有方法获得了最高的攻击成功率，同时当前的人脸变形攻击检测方案难以发现此类攻击。
AI.conclusion: DCMorph通过创新的双流扩散机制，在保持高质量图像生成的同时显著提升了人脸变形攻击的效果，对身份验证系统的安全性提出了新的挑战，也强调了开发更强大防御技术的必要性。

title: A Multimodal Text- and Graph-Based Approach for Open-Domain Event Extraction from Documents
summary: Event extraction is essential for event understanding and analysis. It supports tasks such as document summarization and decision-making in emergency scenarios. However, existing event extraction approaches have limitations: (1) closed-domain algorithms are restricted to predefined event types and thus rarely generalize to unseen types and (2) open-domain event extraction algorithms, capable of handling unconstrained event types, have largely overlooked the potential of large language models (LLMs) despite their advanced abilities. Additionally, they do not explicitly model document-level contextual, structural, and semantic reasoning, which are crucial for effective event extraction but remain challenging for LLMs due to lost-in-the-middle phenomenon and attention dilution. To address these limitations, we propose multimodal open-domain event extraction, MODEE , a novel approach for open-domain event extraction that combines graph-based learning with text-based representation from LLMs to model document-level reasoning. Empirical evaluations on large datasets demonstrate that MODEE outperforms state-of-the-art open-domain event extraction approaches and can be generalized to closed-domain event extraction, where it outperforms existing algorithms.

AI.tldr: MODEE是一个结合图学习与大型语言模型的开放领域事件抽取方法，通过建模文档级推理来克服现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有事件抽取方法存在两大局限：闭域算法无法泛化到未见事件类型，而开放域算法忽视了大型语言模型的潜力，且未能显式建模文档级的上下文、结构和语义推理。
AI.method: MODEE采用多模态开放域事件抽取框架，将基于图的学习与LLM的文本表示相结合，以建模文档级推理过程，解决LLM在处理长文档时出现的注意力稀释等问题。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集上的实验表明，MODEE超越了现有最先进的开放域事件抽取方法，并能泛化应用于闭域事件抽取任务，在此领域同样优于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: MODEE通过有效结合图结构和LLM的文本表示能力，为开放域事件抽取提供了一种有效的解决方案，同时展现了在闭域任务中的良好泛化能力。

title: DualSplat: Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting via Pseudo-Mask Bootstrapping from Reconstruction Failures
comment: 10 pages,6 figures, accepted to Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference 2026
summary: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieves real-time photorealistic rendering, its performance degrades significantly when training images contain transient objects that violate multi-view consistency. Existing methods face a circular dependency: accurate transient detection requires a well-reconstructed static scene, while clean reconstruction itself depends on reliable transient masks. We address this challenge with DualSplat, a Failure-to-Prior framework that converts first-pass reconstruction failures into explicit priors for a second reconstruction stage. We observe that transients, which appear in only a subset of views, often manifest as incomplete fragments during conservative initial training. We exploit these failures to construct object-level pseudo-masks by combining photometric residuals, feature mismatches, and SAM2 instance boundaries. These pseudo-masks then guide a clean second-pass 3DGS optimization, while a lightweight MLP refines them online by gradually shifting from prior supervision to self-consistency. Experiments on RobustNeRF and NeRF On-the-go show that DualSplat outperforms existing baselines, demonstrating particularly clear advantages in transient-heavy scenes and transient regions.

AI.tldr: DualSplat是一个双阶段3D高斯泼溅框架，首次利用重建失败的显式先验来解决瞬态对象干扰的反向依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅在包含瞬态对象（违反多视角一致性的临时物体）的场景中性能严重下降，而现有方法存在循环依赖问题：准确的瞬态检测需要良好的静态场景重建，而干净的重建又依赖于可靠的瞬态掩码。
AI.method: 提出Failure-to-Prior框架：第一阶段保守训练产生不完整的瞬态片段，结合光度残差、特征不匹配和SAM2实例边界构建对象级伪掩码；第二阶段使用这些伪掩码指导干净的3DGS优化，同时通过轻量级MLP在线精炼掩码，逐步从先验监督转向自一致性。
AI.result: 在RobustNeRF和NeRF On-the-go数据集上的实验表明，DualSplat优于现有基线方法，在瞬态对象密集场景和瞬态区域表现尤其突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过将第一阶段重建失败转化为显式先验，成功解决了瞬态对象检测和场景重建之间的循环依赖，实现了更鲁棒的含瞬态对象场景的三维重建。

title: TingIS: Real-time Risk Event Discovery from Noisy Customer Incidents at Enterprise Scale
summary: Real-time detection and mitigation of technical anomalies are critical for large-scale cloud-native services, where even minutes of downtime can result in massive financial losses and diminished user trust. While customer incidents serve as a vital signal for discovering risks missed by monitoring, extracting actionable intelligence from this data remains challenging due to extreme noise, high throughput, and semantic complexity of diverse business lines. In this paper, we present TingIS, an end-to-end system designed for enterprise-grade incident discovery. At the core of TingIS is a multi-stage event linking engine that synergizes efficient indexing techniques with Large Language Models (LLMs) to make informed decisions on event merging, enabling the stable extraction of actionable incidents from just a handful of diverse user descriptions. This engine is complemented by a cascaded routing mechanism for precise business attribution and a multi-dimensional noise reduction pipeline that integrates domain knowledge, statistical patterns, and behavioral filtering. Deployed in a production environment handling a peak throughput of over 2,000 messages per minute and 300,000 messages per day, TingIS achieves a P90 alert latency of 3.5 minutes and a 95\% discovery rate for high-priority incidents. Benchmarks constructed from real-world data demonstrate that TingIS significantly outperforms baseline methods in routing accuracy, clustering quality, and Signal-to-Noise Ratio.

AI.tldr: TingIS是一个企业级事件发现系统，通过结合LLM和多阶段事件链接技术，从海量客户事件中实时发现高优先级技术异常。
AI.motivation: 大规模云原生服务中，客户事件是发现监控遗漏风险的重要信号，但极端噪声、高吞吐量和业务语义复杂性使得从中提取可行动情报极具挑战性。
AI.method: TingIS采用多阶段事件链接引擎，融合高效索引技术与大型语言模型进行智能事件合并决策，配合级联路由机制实现精确业务归属，并集成领域知识、统计模式和行为过滤的多维降噪流水线。
AI.result: 在生产环境中处理每分钟2000+、每日30万条消息，P90告警延迟3.5分钟，高优先级事件发现率达95%，在路由准确性、聚类质量和信噪比方面显著超越基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TingIS成功解决了企业级海量客户事件中的实时异常检测难题，为云原生服务提供了可靠的技术风险发现和响应能力。

title: Causal Disentanglement for Full-Reference Image Quality Assessment
summary: Existing deep network-based full-reference image quality assessment (FR-IQA) models typically work by performing pairwise comparisons of deep features from the reference and distorted images. In this paper, we approach this problem from a different perspective and propose a novel FR-IQA paradigm based on causal inference and decoupled representation learning. Unlike typical feature comparison-based FR-IQA models, our approach formulates degradation estimation as a causal disentanglement process guided by intervention on latent representations. We first decouple degradation and content representations by exploiting the content invariance between the reference and distorted images. Second, inspired by the human visual masking effect, we design a masking module to model the causal relationship between image content and degradation features, thereby extracting content-influenced degradation features from distorted images. Finally, quality scores are predicted from these degradation features using either supervised regression or label-free dimensionality reduction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves highly competitive performance on standard IQA benchmarks across fully supervised, few-label, and label-free settings.
